Compliance.description: Part of established group with 30+ years; POPIA compliance stated; no negative regulatory news; certified pre-owned vehicles imply NRCS vehicle compliance.

Customer Satisfaction.description: 4.1/5 on AutoTrader (22 reviews); mixed HelloPeter (positive professional service, some dishonest claims); group testimonials mostly positive.

Product Value.description: Certified pre-owned with inspections; wide range sedans to SUVs; transparent pricing on sites; value via finance and trade-ins.

Innovation.description: Modern website with vehicle search filters; social media presence (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube); no dedicated app or advanced digital features found.

Customer Support.description: Positive feedback on sales service, home test drives, follow-up; some complaints on staff attitude; phone, WhatsApp, website contact.

Accessibility & Security.description: POPIA-compliant privacy policy on group sites with security safeguards; standard website access, no app found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Pre-owned cars from R70,000 e.g. Honda Brio; up to R1M+ luxury; finance from R3,000-R12,000 pm (2025/2026 listings)

socialSentiment.summary: Limited recent X data; website testimonials positive; AutoTrader 4.1/5 mixed but positive leaning.
